description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a hooded sweatshirt with a subtle iridescent pattern and matching jogger-style pants. The figure wears modern sneakers and sports a short, neatly styled haircut. He has a pair of glasses and his hands are relaxed at his sides, fingers slightly spread. The hoodie has a front pocket and drawstrings, and the pants are tapered at the ankles. The overall build is average, with a realistic human body proportion and a neutral, upright stance. The surface of the clothing appears soft and matte, while the shoes and glasses have a slightly smoother finish.
description: A casually dressed adult male figure in a hoodie, jogger pants, sneakers, and glasses, standing upright with a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hoodie with drawstrings, glasses, and relaxed hands at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the hood, and the tapered pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hooded sweatshirt and the back of the jogger pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, hand details, and the side seam of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt and jogger pants with modern sneakers and glasses
